case.title: LAB-2.5 Voice Fraud and Help Desk MFA Reset Abuse
case.description:
### Narrative
ApexFin Solutions receives a suspicious help desk call from a person claiming to be the CFO. The caller pressures Help Desk Tier 1 to bypass verification, use a non-directory callback number, and complete an MFA device rebind. Shortly afterward, identity logs show a new MFA device, a new device login, and browsing to a suspicious look-alike domain.

### What you must prove
1) Whether the call shows social engineering markers.
2) Whether help desk verification failed, was skipped, or was incomplete.
3) Whether the MFA reset/rebind was followed by risky login activity.
4) Whether endpoint and Zeek evidence shows access to suspicious infrastructure.
5) What containment and process changes are required.

### ATT&CK mapping
- T1566.004 — Phishing: Spearphishing Voice
- T1598.004 — Phishing for Information: Spearphishing Voice
- T1656 — Impersonation
- T1078 — Valid Accounts

tasks.title: Review call metadata
tasks.description: Compare caller ID, callback number, attestation, duration, and risk flags.

tasks.title: Review transcript for social engineering markers
tasks.description: Identify urgency, authority pressure, refusal of verification, and alternate callback requests.

tasks.title: Correlate help desk and MFA activity
tasks.description: Use case_id, ticket_id, user, caller_id, source_ip, and device_id to build the timeline.

tasks.title: Review endpoint and network telemetry
tasks.description: Confirm suspicious URL access, script execution, and Zeek HTTP activity.

tasks.title: Enrich observables in MISP
tasks.description: Promote validated caller, callback, domain, URL, IP, user, and ticket observables.

tasks.title: Draft detection logic
tasks.description: Write Sigma and OpenSearch logic for voice-driven MFA reset abuse.

tasks.title: Produce final analyst report
tasks.description: Summarize evidence, timeline, impact, and mitigations.

observables.message: Suspicious caller ID used in voice fraud attempt
Non-directory callback number requested by caller
Suspicious verification URL referenced after the call
Synthetic source IP for new device login and web activity

notes.title: Safe Training Scope
notes.content: This case uses synthetic records and teaches defensive monitoring, triage, escalation, and response. It does not include voice cloning, deepfake generation, or bypass instructions.

notes.title: Evidence Standard
notes.content: AI output is an analyst aid, not evidence. Every claim must be validated against call records, transcripts, help desk events, identity events, endpoint telemetry, network telemetry, MISP, or TheHive artifacts.
